```rst
&#x20; :class:`kombu.exceptions.EncodingError` error.



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Ionel Cristian Mărieș.



\- Worker with :option:`-B <celery worker -B>` argument didn't properly

&#x20; shut down the beat instance.



\- Worker: The ``%n`` and ``%h`` formats are now also supported by the

&#x20; :option:`--logfile <celery worker --logfile>`,

&#x20; :option:`--pidfile <celery worker --pidfile>` and

&#x20; :option:`--statedb <celery worker --statedb>` arguments.



&#x20;   Example:



&#x20;   .. code-block:: bash



&#x20;       $ celery -A proj worker -n foo@%h --logfile=%n.log --statedb=%n.db



\- Redis/Cache result backends: Will now timeout if keys evicted while trying

&#x20; to join a chord.



\- The fallback unlock chord task now raises :exc:`Retry` so that the

&#x20; retry even is properly logged by the worker.



\- Multi: Will no longer apply Eventlet/gevent monkey patches (Issue #1717).



\- Redis result backend: Now supports UNIX sockets.



&#x20;   Like the Redis broker transport the result backend now also supports

&#x20;   using ``redis+socket:///tmp/redis.sock`` URLs.



&#x20;   Contributed by Alcides Viamontes Esquivel.



\- Events: Events sent by clients was mistaken for worker related events

&#x20; (Issue #1714).



&#x20;   For ``events.State`` the tasks now have a ``Task.client`` attribute

&#x20;   that's set when a ``task-sent`` event is being received.



&#x20;   Also, a clients logical clock isn't in sync with the cluster so

&#x20;   they live in a "time bubble." So for this reason monitors will no

&#x20;   longer attempt to merge with the clock of an event sent by a client,

&#x20;   instead it will fake the value by using the current clock with

&#x20;   a skew of -1.



\- Prefork pool: The method used to find terminated processes was flawed

&#x20; in that it didn't also take into account missing ``popen`` objects.



\- Canvas: ``group`` and ``chord`` now works with anon signatures as long

&#x20; as the group/chord object is associated with an app instance (Issue #1744).



&#x20;   You can pass the app by using ``group(..., app=app)``.



.. \_version-3.1.6:



3.1.6

=====

:release-date: 2013-12-02 06:00 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Now depends on :mod:`billiard` 3.3.0.10.



\- Now depends on :ref:`Kombu 3.0.7 <kombu:version-3.0.7>`.



\- Fixed problem where Mingle caused the worker to hang at start-up

&#x20; (Issue #1686).



\- Beat: Would attempt to drop privileges twice (Issue #1708).



\- Windows: Fixed error with ``geteuid`` not being available (Issue #1676).



\- Tasks can now provide a list of expected error classes (Issue #1682).



&#x20;   The list should only include errors that the task is expected to raise

&#x20;   during normal operation::



&#x20;       @task(throws=(KeyError, HttpNotFound))



&#x20;   What happens when an exceptions is raised depends on the type of error:



&#x20;   - Expected errors (included in ``Task.throws``)



&#x20;       Will be logged using severity ``INFO``, and traceback is excluded.



&#x20;   - Unexpected errors



&#x20;       Will be logged using severity ``ERROR``, with traceback included.



\- Cache result backend now compatible with Python 3 (Issue #1697).



\- CentOS init-script: Now compatible with SysV style init symlinks.



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Jonathan Jordan.



\- Events: Fixed problem when task name isn't defined (Issue #1710).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Mher Movsisyan.



\- Task: Fixed unbound local errors (Issue #1684).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Markus Ullmann.



\- Canvas: Now unrolls groups with only one task (optimization) (Issue #1656).



\- Task: Fixed problem with ETA and timezones.



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Alexander Koval.



\- Django: Worker now performs model validation (Issue #1681).



\- Task decorator now emits less confusing errors when used with

&#x20; incorrect arguments (Issue #1692).



\- Task: New method ``Task.send\_event`` can be used to send custom events

&#x20; to Flower and other monitors.



\- Fixed a compatibility issue with non-abstract task classes



\- Events from clients now uses new node name format (``gen<pid>@<hostname>``).



\- Fixed rare bug with Callable not being defined at interpreter shutdown

&#x20; (Issue #1678).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Nick Johnson.



\- Fixed Python 2.6 compatibility (Issue #1679).



.. \_version-3.1.5:



3.1.5

=====

:release-date: 2013-11-21 06:20 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Now depends on :ref:`Kombu 3.0.6 <kombu:version-3.0.6>`.



\- Now depends on :mod:`billiard` 3.3.0.8



\- App: ``config\_from\_object`` is now lazy (Issue #1665).



\- App: ``autodiscover\_tasks`` is now lazy.



&#x20;   Django users should now wrap access to the settings object

&#x20;   in a lambda::



&#x20;       app.autodiscover\_tasks(lambda: settings.INSTALLED\_APPS)



&#x20;   this ensures that the settings object isn't prepared

&#x20;   prematurely.



\- Fixed regression for :option:`--app <celery --app>` argument

&#x20; experienced by some users (Issue #1653).



\- Worker: Now respects the :option:`--uid <celery worker --uid>` and

&#x20; :option:`--gid <celery worker --gid>` arguments even if

&#x20; :option:`--detach <celery worker --detach>` isn't enabled.



\- Beat: Now respects the :option:`--uid <celery beat --uid>` and

&#x20; :option:`--gid <celery beat --gid>` arguments even if

&#x20; :option:`--detach <celery beat --detach>` isn't enabled.



\- Python 3: Fixed unorderable error occurring with the worker

&#x20; :option:`-B <celery worker -B>` argument enabled.



\- ``celery.VERSION`` is now a named tuple.



\- ``maybe\_signature(list)`` is now applied recursively (Issue #1645).



\- ``celery shell`` command: Fixed ``IPython.frontend`` deprecation warning.



\- The default app no longer includes the built-in fix-ups.



&#x20;   This fixes a bug where ``celery multi`` would attempt

&#x20;   to load the Django settings module before entering

&#x20;   the target working directory.



\- The Django daemonization tutorial was changed.



&#x20;   Users no longer have to explicitly export ``DJANGO\_SETTINGS\_MODULE``

&#x20;   in :file:`/etc/default/celeryd` when the new project layout is used.



\- Redis result backend: expiry value can now be 0 (Issue #1661).



\- Censoring settings now accounts for non-string keys (Issue #1663).



\- App: New ``autofinalize`` option.



&#x20;   Apps are automatically finalized when the task registry is accessed.

&#x20;   You can now disable this behavior so that an exception is raised

&#x20;   instead.



&#x20;   Example:



&#x20;   .. code-block:: python



&#x20;       app = Celery(autofinalize=False)



&#x20;       # raises RuntimeError

&#x20;       tasks = app.tasks



&#x20;       @app.task

&#x20;       def add(x, y):

&#x20;           return x + y



&#x20;       # raises RuntimeError

&#x20;       add.delay(2, 2)



&#x20;       app.finalize()

&#x20;       # no longer raises:

&#x20;       tasks = app.tasks

&#x20;       add.delay(2, 2)



\- The worker didn't send monitoring events during shutdown.



\- Worker: Mingle and gossip is now automatically disabled when

&#x20; used with an unsupported transport (Issue #1664).



\- ``celery`` command:  Preload options now supports

&#x20; the rare ``--opt value`` format (Issue #1668).



\- ``celery`` command: Accidentally removed options

&#x20; appearing before the sub-command, these are now moved to the end

&#x20; instead.



\- Worker now properly responds to ``inspect stats`` commands

&#x20; even if received before start-up is complete (Issue #1659).



\- :signal:`task\_postrun` is now sent within a :keyword:`finally` block,

&#x20; to make sure the signal is always sent.



\- Beat: Fixed syntax error in string formatting.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`nadad`.



\- Fixed typos in the documentation.



&#x20;   Fixes contributed by Loic Bistuer, :github\_user:`sunfinite`.



\- Nested chains now works properly when constructed using the

&#x20; ``chain`` type instead of the ``|`` operator (Issue #1656).



.. \_version-3.1.4:



3.1.4

=====

:release-date: 2013-11-15 11:40 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Now depends on :ref:`Kombu 3.0.5 <kombu:version-3.0.5>`.



\- Now depends on :mod:`billiard` 3.3.0.7



\- Worker accidentally set a default socket timeout of 5 seconds.



\- Django: Fix-up now sets the default app so that threads will use

&#x20; the same app instance (e.g., for :command:`manage.py runserver`).



\- Worker: Fixed Unicode error crash at start-up experienced by some users.



\- Calling ``.apply\_async`` on an empty chain now works again (Issue #1650).



\- The ``celery multi show`` command now generates the same arguments

&#x20; as the start command does.



\- The :option:`--app <celery --app>` argument could end up using a module

&#x20; object instead of an app instance (with a resulting crash).



\- Fixed a syntax error problem in the beat init-script.



&#x20;   Fix contributed by Vsevolod.



\- Tests now passing on PyPy 2.1 and 2.2.



.. \_version-3.1.3:



3.1.3

=====

:release-date: 2013-11-13 00:55 a.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Fixed compatibility problem with Python 2.7.0 - 2.7.5 (Issue #1637)



&#x20;   ``unpack\_from`` started supporting ``memoryview`` arguments

&#x20;   in Python 2.7.6.



\- Worker: :option:`-B <celery worker -B>` argument accidentally closed

&#x20; files used for logging.



\- Task decorated tasks now keep their docstring (Issue #1636)



.. \_version-3.1.2:



3.1.2

=====

:release-date: 2013-11-12 08:00 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Now depends on :mod:`billiard` 3.3.0.6



\- No longer needs the billiard C extension to be installed.



\- The worker silently ignored task errors.



\- Django: Fixed ``ImproperlyConfigured`` error raised

&#x20; when no database backend specified.



&#x20;   Fix contributed by :github\_user:`j0hnsmith`.



\- Prefork pool: Now using ``\_multiprocessing.read`` with ``memoryview``

&#x20; if available.



\- ``close\_open\_fds`` now uses ``os.closerange`` if available.



\- ``get\_fdmax`` now takes value from ``sysconfig`` if possible.



.. \_version-3.1.1:



3.1.1

=====

:release-date: 2013-11-11 06:30 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- Now depends on :mod:`billiard` 3.3.0.4.



\- Python 3: Fixed compatibility issues.



\- Windows:  Accidentally showed warning that the billiard C extension

&#x20; wasn't installed (Issue #1630).



\- Django: Tutorial updated with a solution that sets a default

&#x20; :envvar:`DJANGO\_SETTINGS\_MODULE` so that it doesn't have to be typed

&#x20; in with the :program:`celery` command.



&#x20;   Also fixed typos in the tutorial, and added the settings

&#x20;   required to use the Django database backend.



&#x20;   Thanks to Chris Ward, :github\_user:`orarbel`.



\- Django: Fixed a problem when using the Django settings in Django 1.6.



\- Django: Fix-up shouldn't be applied if the django loader is active.



\- Worker:  Fixed attribute error for ``human\_write\_stats`` when using the

&#x20; compatibility prefork pool implementation.



\- Worker: Fixed compatibility with billiard without C extension.



\- Inspect.conf: Now supports a ``with\_defaults`` argument.



\- Group.restore: The backend argument wasn't respected.



.. \_version-3.1.0:



3.1.0

=======

:release-date: 2013-11-09 11:00 p.m. UTC

:release-by: Ask Solem



See :ref:`whatsnew-3.1`.



```



\### 代码文件: docs\\history\\changelog-4.0.rst

```rst

.. \_changelog-4.0:



================

&#x20;Change history

================



This document contains change notes for bugfix releases in

the 4.0.x series (latentcall), please see :ref:`whatsnew-4.0` for

an overview of what's new in Celery 4.0.



.. \_version-4.0.2:



4.0.2

=====

:release-date: 2016-12-15 03:40 PM PST

:release-by: Ask Solem



\- \*\*Requirements\*\*



&#x20;   - Now depends on :ref:`Kombu 4.0.2 <kombu:version-4.0.2>`.



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Fixed problem with JSON serialization of `group`

&#x20; (``keys must be string`` error, Issue #3688).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed JSON serialization issue when using ``inspect active``

&#x20; and friends (Issue #3667).



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fixed saferef errors when using signals (Issue #3670).



\- \*\*Prefork\*\*: Fixed bug with pack requiring bytes argument

&#x20; on Python 2.7.5 and earlier (Issue #3674).



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Saferepr did not handle unicode in bytestrings on Python 2

&#x20; (Issue #3676).



\- \*\*Testing\*\*: Added new ``celery\_worker\_paremeters`` fixture.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Michael Howitz\*\*.



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Added new ``app`` argument to ``GroupResult.restore``

&#x20; (Issue #3669).



&#x20;   This makes the restore method behave the same way as the ``GroupResult``

&#x20;   constructor.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Andreas Pelme\*\*.



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Fixed type checking crash when task takes ``\*args`` on Python 3

&#x20; (Issue #3678).



\- Documentation and examples improvements by:



&#x20;   - \*\*BLAGA Razvan-Paul\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Michael Howitz\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`paradox41`



.. \_version-4.0.1:



4.0.1

=====

:release-date: 2016-12-08 05:22 PM PST

:release-by: Ask Solem



\* \[Security: `CELERYSA-0003`\_] Insecure default configuration



&#x20;   The default :setting:`accept\_content` setting was set to allow

&#x20;   deserialization of pickled messages in Celery 4.0.0.



&#x20;   The insecure default has been fixed in 4.0.1, and you can also

&#x20;   configure the 4.0.0 version to explicitly only allow json serialized

&#x20;   messages:



&#x20;   .. code-block:: python



&#x20;       app.conf.accept\_content = \['json']



.. \_`CELERYSA-0003`:

&#x20;   https://github.com/celery/celery/tree/master/docs/sec/CELERYSA-0003.txt



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Added new method to register class-based tasks (Issue #3615).



&#x20;   To register a class based task you should now call ``app.register\_task``:



&#x20;   .. code-block:: python



&#x20;       from celery import Celery, Task



&#x20;       app = Celery()



&#x20;       class CustomTask(Task):



&#x20;           def run(self):

&#x20;               return 'hello'



&#x20;       app.register\_task(CustomTask())



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: Argument checking now supports keyword-only arguments on Python3

&#x20; (Issue #3658).



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`sww`.



\- \*\*Tasks\*\*: The ``task-sent`` event was not being sent even if

&#x20; configured to do so (Issue #3646).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed AMQP heartbeat support for eventlet/gevent pools

&#x20; (Issue #3649).



\- \*\*App\*\*: ``app.conf.humanize()`` would not work if configuration

&#x20; not finalized (Issue #3652).



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: ``saferepr`` attempted to show iterables as lists

&#x20; and mappings as dicts.



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: ``saferepr`` did not handle unicode-errors

&#x20; when attempting to format ``bytes`` on Python 3 (Issue #3610).



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: ``saferepr`` should now properly represent byte strings

&#x20; with non-ascii characters (Issue #3600).



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Fixed bug in elasticsearch where \_index method missed

&#x20; the body argument (Issue #3606).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*何翔宇\*\* (Sean Ho).



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fixed :exc:`ValueError` in chord with single task header

&#x20; (Issue #3608).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*Viktor Holmqvist\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Ensure class-based task has name prior to registration

&#x20; (Issue #3616).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*Rick Wargo\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Fixed problem with strings in shelve (Issue #3644).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*Alli\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed :exc:`KeyError` in ``inspect stats`` when ``-O`` argument

&#x20; set to something other than ``fast`` or ``fair`` (Issue #3621).



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Retried tasks were no longer sent to the original queue

&#x20; (Issue #3622).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Python 3: Fixed None/int type comparison in

&#x20; :file:`apps/worker.py` (Issue #3631).



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Redis has a new :setting:`redis\_socket\_connect\_timeout`

&#x20; setting.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Redis result backend passed the ``socket\_connect\_timeout``

&#x20; argument to UNIX socket based connections by mistake, causing a crash.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed missing logo in worker splash screen when running on

&#x20; Python 3.x (Issue #3627).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*Brian Luan\*\*.



\- \*\*Deps\*\*: Fixed ``celery\[redis]`` bundle installation (Issue #3643).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*Rémi Marenco\*\*.



\- \*\*Deps\*\*: Bundle ``celery\[sqs]`` now also requires :pypi:`pycurl`

&#x20; (Issue #3619).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Hard time limits were no longer being respected (Issue #3618).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Soft time limit log showed ``Trues`` instead of the number

&#x20; of seconds.



\- \*\*App\*\*: ``registry\_cls`` argument no longer had any effect (Issue #3613).



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Event producer now uses ``connection\_for\_Write`` (Issue #3525).



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Redis/memcache backends now uses :setting:`result\_expires`

&#x20; to expire chord counter (Issue #3573).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Tayfun Sen\*\*.



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Fixed command for upgrading settings with Django (Issue #3563).



&#x20;   Fix contributed by \*\*François Voron\*\*.



\- \*\*Testing\*\*: Added a ``celery\_parameters`` test fixture to be able to use

&#x20; customized ``Celery`` init parameters. (#3626)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Steffen Allner\*\*.



\- Documentation improvements contributed by



&#x20;   - :github\_user:`csfeathers`

&#x20;   - \*\*Moussa Taifi\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Yuhannaa\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Laurent Peuch\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Christian\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Bruno Alla\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Steven Johns\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`tnir`

&#x20;   - \*\*GDR!\*\*



.. \_version-4.0.0:



4.0.0

=====

:release-date: 2016-11-04 02:00 P.M PDT

:release-by: Ask Solem



See :ref:`whatsnew-4.0` (in :file:`docs/whatsnew-4.0.rst`).



.. \_version-4.0.0rc7:



4.0.0rc7

========

:release-date: 2016-11-02 01:30 P.M PDT



Important notes

\---------------



\- Database result backend related setting names changed from

&#x20; ``sqlalchemy\_\*`` -> ``database\_\*``.



&#x20;   The ``sqlalchemy\_`` named settings won't work at all in this

&#x20;   version so you need to rename them.  This is a last minute change,

&#x20;   and as they were not supported in 3.1 we will not be providing

&#x20;   aliases.



\- ``chain(A, B, C)`` now works the same way as ``A | B | C``.



&#x20;   This means calling ``chain()`` might not actually return a chain,

&#x20;   it can return a group or any other type depending on how the

&#x20;   workflow can be optimized.



```



\### 代码文件: docs\\history\\changelog-4.1.rst

```rst

.. \_changelog-4.1:



================

&#x20;Change history

================



This document contains change notes for bugfix releases in

the 4.1.x series, please see :ref:`whatsnew-4.2` for

an overview of what's new in Celery 4.2.



.. \_version-4.1.1:



4.1.1

=====

:release-date: 2018-05-21 12:48 PM PST

:release-by: Omer Katz



.. important::



&#x09;Please upgrade as soon as possible or pin Kombu to 4.1.0.



\- \*\*Breaking Change\*\*: The module `async` in Kombu changed to `asynchronous`.



Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz \& Asif Saifuddin Auvi\*\*



.. \_version-4.1.0:



4.1.0

=====

:release-date: 2017-07-25 00:00 PM PST

:release-by: Omer Katz





\- \*\*Configuration\*\*: CELERY\_SEND\_EVENTS instead of CELERYD\_SEND\_EVENTS for 3.1.x compatibility (#3997)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*abhinav nilaratna\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Restore behavior so Broadcast queues work. (#3934)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Patrick Cloke\*\*.



\- \*\*Sphinx\*\*: Make appstr use standard format (#4134) (#4139)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Preston Moore\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Make id, name always accessible from logging.Formatter via extra (#3994)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Yoichi NAKAYAMA\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Add worker\_shutting\_down signal (#3998)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Daniel Huang\*\*.



\- \*\*PyPy\*\*: Support PyPy version 5.8.0 (#4128)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Elasticsearch: Fix serializing keys (#3924)



&#x20;Contributed by :github\_user:`staticfox`.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Deserialize all tasks in a chain (#4015)



&#x20;Contributed by :github\_user:`fcoelho`.



\- \*\*Systemd\*\*: Recover loglevel for ExecStart in systemd config (#4023)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Yoichi NAKAYAMA\*\*.



\- \*\*Sphinx\*\*: Use the Sphinx add\_directive\_to\_domain API. (#4037)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Patrick Cloke\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Pass properties to before\_task\_publish signal (#4035)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Javier Domingo Cansino\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Add SSL option for Redis backends (#3831)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Chris Kuehl\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: celery.schedule.crontab: fix reduce (#3826) (#3827)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Taylor C. Richberger\*\*.



\- \*\*State\*\*: Fix celery issues when using flower REST API



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Thierry RAMORASOAVINA\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Elasticsearch: Fix serializing document id.



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Acey9\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Make shallow copy of schedules dictionary



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Brian May\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Populate heap when periodic tasks are changed



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Wojciech Żywno\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Allow class methods to define tasks (#3952)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*georgepsarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Platforms\*\*: Always return boolean value when checking if signal is supported (#3962).



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Jian Yu\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Avoid duplicating chains in chords (#3779)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Ryan Hiebert\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Lookup task only if list has items (#3847)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Marc Gibbons\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Allow unicode message for exception raised in task (#3903)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Python3\*\*: Support for Python 3.6 (#3904, #3903, #3736)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Jon Dufresne\*\*, \*\*George Psarakis\*\*, \*\*Asif Saifuddin Auvi\*\*, \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fix retried tasks with expirations (#3790)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Brendan MacDonell\*\*.



\- \* Fixes items format route in docs (#3875)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Slam\*\*.



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: Fix maybe\_make\_aware (#3850)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Taylor C. Richberger\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Fix task ETA issues when timezone is defined in configuration (#3867)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Concurrency\*\*: Consumer does not shutdown properly when embedded in gevent application (#3746)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Arcadiy Ivanov\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fix #3725: Task replaced with group does not complete (#3731)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Morgan Doocy\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Correct order in chains with replaced tasks (#3730)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Morgan Doocy\*\*.



\- \*\*Result\*\*: Enable synchronous execution of sub-tasks (#3696)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*shalev67\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Fix request context for blocking task apply (added hostname) (#3716)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Marat Sharafutdinov\*\*.



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: Fix task argument handling (#3678) (#3693)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Roman Sichny\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Provide a transparent method to update the Scheduler heap (#3721)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Alejandro Pernin\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Specify default value for pidfile option of celery beat. (#3722)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Arnaud Rocher\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Elasticsearch: Stop generating a new field every time when a new result is being put (#3708)



&#x20;Contributed by \*\*Mike Chen\*\*.



\- \*\*Requirements\*\*



&#x20;   - Now depends on :ref:`Kombu 4.1.0 <kombu:version-4.1.0>`.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Elasticsearch now reuses fields when new results are added.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Mike Chen\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Fixed MongoDB integration when using binary encodings

&#x20; (Issue #3575).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Andrew de Quincey\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Making missing ``\*args`` and ``\*\*kwargs`` in Task protocol 1

&#x20; return empty value in protocol 2 (Issue #3687).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Roman Sichny\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fixed :exc:`TypeError` in AMQP when using deprecated signal

&#x20; (Issue #3707).



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`michael-k`.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Added a transparent method to update the scheduler heap.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alejandro Pernin\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Fixed handling of tasks with keyword arguments on Python 3

&#x20; (Issue #3657).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Roman Sichny\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Fixed request context for blocking task apply by adding missing

&#x20; hostname attribute.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Marat Sharafutdinov\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Added option to run subtasks synchronously with

&#x20; ``disable\_sync\_subtasks`` argument.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`shalev67`.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fixed chaining of replaced tasks (Issue #3726).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Morgan Doocy\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fixed bug where replaced tasks with groups were not completing

&#x20; (Issue #3725).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Morgan Doocy\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed problem where consumer does not shutdown properly when

&#x20; embedded in a gevent application (Issue #3745).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Arcadiy Ivanov\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Added support for using AWS DynamoDB as a result backend (#3736).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Testing\*\*: Added caching on pip installs.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`orf`.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Prevent consuming queue before ready on startup (Issue #3620).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alan Hamlett\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fixed task ETA issues when timezone is defined in configuration

&#x20; (Issue #3753).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: ``maybe\_make\_aware`` should not modify datetime when it is

&#x20; already timezone-aware (Issue #3849).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Taylor C. Richberger\*\*.



\- \*\*App\*\*: Fixed retrying tasks with expirations (Issue #3734).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Brendan MacDonell\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Allow unicode message for exceptions raised in task

&#x20; (Issue #3858).



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`staticfox`.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fixed :exc:`IndexError` raised when chord has an empty header.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Marc Gibbons\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Avoid duplicating chains in chords (Issue #3771).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Ryan Hiebert\*\* and \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Utils\*\*: Allow class methods to define tasks (Issue #3863).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Populate heap when periodic tasks are changed.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`wzywno` and \*\*Brian May\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Added support for Elasticsearch backend options settings.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`Acey9`.



\- \*\*Events\*\*: Ensure ``Task.as\_dict()`` works when not all information about

&#x20; task is available.



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`tramora`.



\- \*\*Schedules\*\*: Fixed pickled crontab schedules to restore properly (Issue #3826).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Taylor C. Richberger\*\*.



\- \*\*Results\*\*: Added SSL option for redis backends (Issue #3830).



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Chris Kuehl\*\*.



\- Documentation and examples improvements by:



&#x20;   - \*\*Bruno Alla\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jamie Alessio\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Vivek Anand\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Peter Bittner\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Kalle Bronsen\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jon Dufresne\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*James Michael DuPont\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Sergey Fursov\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Samuel Dion-Girardeau\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Daniel Hahler\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Mike Helmick\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Marc Hörsken\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Christopher Hoskin\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Daniel Huang\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Primož Kerin\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Michal Kuffa\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Simon Legner\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Anthony Lukach\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Ed Morley\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jay McGrath\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Rico Moorman\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Viraj Navkal\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Ross Patterson\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Dmytro Petruk\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Luke Plant\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Eric Poelke\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Salvatore Rinchiera\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Arnaud Rocher\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Kirill Romanov\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Simon Schmidt\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Tamer Sherif\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*YuLun Shih\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Ask Solem\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Tom 'Biwaa' Riat\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Arthur Vigil\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Joey Wilhelm\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jian Yu\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*YuLun Shih\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Arthur Vigil\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Joey Wilhelm\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`baixuexue123`

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`bronsen`

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`michael-k`

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`orf`

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`3lnc`



```



\### 代码文件: docs\\history\\changelog-4.2.rst

```rst

.. \_changelog-4.2:



================

&#x20;Change history

================



This document contains change notes for bugfix releases in

the 4.2.x series, please see :ref:`whatsnew-4.2` for

an overview of what's new in Celery 4.2.



4.2.1

=====

:release-date: 2018-07-18 11:00 AM IST

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Fix deserialization of exceptions that are present in the producer codebase but not in the consumer codebase.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*John Arnold\*\*



\- \*\*Message Protocol Compatibility\*\*: Fix error caused by an invalid (None) timelimit value in the message headers when migrating messages from 3.x to 4.x.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Robert Kopaczewski\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Fix serialization of exception arguments when exception arguments are not JSON serializable by default.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Tom Booth\*\*



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Fixed multiple issues with rate limited tasks



&#x20; Maintain scheduling order.

&#x20; Fix possible scheduling of a :class:`celery.worker.request.Request` with the wrong :class:`kombu.utils.limits.TokenBucket` which could cause tasks' rate limit to behave incorrectly.

&#x20; Fix possible duplicated execution of tasks that were rate limited or if ETA/Countdown was provided for them.



&#x20; Contributed by :github\_user:`ideascf`



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Defensively handle invalid timelimit header values in requests.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



Documentation fixes:





&#x20;   - \*\*Matt Wiens\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Seunghun Lee\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Lewis M. Kabui\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Prathamesh Salunkhe\*\*



4.2.0

=====

:release-date: 2018-06-10 21:30 PM IST

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Add ``ignore\_result`` as task execution option (#4709, #3834)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Andrii Kostenko\*\* and \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Redis Result Backend\*\*: Do not create PubSub subscriptions when results are ignored (#4709, #3834)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Andrii Kostenko\*\* and \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Redis Result Backend\*\*: Result consumer always unsubscribes when task state is ready (#4666)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Development/Testing\*\*: Add docker-compose and base Dockerfile for development (#4482)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Chris Mitchell\*\*.



\- \*\*Documentation/Sphinx\*\*: Teach autodoc to document tasks if undoc-members is not set (#4588)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Leo Singer\*\*.



\- \*\*Documentation/Sphinx\*\*: Put back undoc-members option in sphinx test (#4586)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Leo Singer\*\*.



\- \*\*Documentation/Sphinx\*\*: Sphinx autodoc picks up tasks automatically only if `undoc-members` is set (#4584)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Leo Singer\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Fix shadow\_name issue when using previous version Task class (#4572)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`pachewise`.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Add support for bound tasks as `link\_error` parameter (Fixes #3723) (#4545)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`brabiega`.



\- \*\*Deployment\*\*: Add a command line option for setting the Result Backend URL (#4549)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`y0ngdi`.



\- \*\*CI\*\*: Enable pip cache in appveyor build (#4546)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Thijs Triemstra\*\*.



\- \*\*Concurrency/Asynpool\*\*: Fix errno property name shadowing.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*DynamoDB Backend\*\*: Configurable endpoint URL (#4532)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Bohdan Rybak\*\*.



\- \*\*Timezones\*\*: Correctly detect UTC timezone and timezone from settings (Fixes #4517) (#4519)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`last-partizan`.



\- \*\*Control\*\*: Cleanup the mailbox's producer pool after forking (#4472)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Nick Eaket\*\*.



\- \*\*Documentation\*\*: Start Celery and Celery Beat on Azure WebJob (#4484)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*PauloPeres\*\*.



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Schedule due tasks on startup, after Beat restart has occurred (#4493)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Igor Kasianov\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Use absolute time when task is accepted by worker pool (#3684)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Régis Behmo\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Propagate arguments to chains inside groups (#4481)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Chris Mitchell\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fix `Task.replace` behavior in nested chords (fixes #4368) (#4369)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Denis Shirokov\*\* \& \*\*Alex Hill\*\*.



\- \*\*Installation\*\*: Pass python\_requires argument to setuptools (#4479)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Jon Dufresne\*\*.



\- \*\*Message Protocol Compatibility\*\*: Handle "hybrid" messages that have moved between Celery versions (#4358) (Issue #4356)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Russell Keith-Magee\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: request on\_timeout now ignores soft time limit exception (fixes #4412) (#4473)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Garel\*\*.



\- \*\*Redis Result Backend\*\*: Integration test to verify PubSub unsubscriptions (#4468)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Message Protocol Properties\*\*: Allow the shadow keyword argument and the shadow\_name method to set shadow properly (#4381)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`hclihn`.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Run chord\_unlock on same queue as chord body (#4448) (Issue #4337)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Hill\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Support chords with empty header group (#4443)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Hill\*\*.



\- \*\*Timezones\*\*: make astimezone call in localize more safe (#4324)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Matt Davis\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fix length-1 and nested chords (#4437) (Issues #4393, #4055, #3885, #3597, #3574, #3323, #4301)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Hill\*\*.



\- \*\*CI\*\*: Run `Openstack Bandit <https://pypi.org/project/bandit/1.0.1/>`\_ in Travis CI in order to detect security issues.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*CI\*\*: Run `isort <https://github.com/timothycrosley/isort>`\_ in Travis CI in order to lint Python \*\*import\*\* statements.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Resolve TypeError on `.get` from nested groups (#4432) (Issue #4274)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Misha Wolfson\*\*.



\- \*\*CouchDB Backend\*\*: Correct CouchDB key string type for Python 2/3 compatibility (#4166)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`fmind` \&\& \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Group Result\*\*: Fix current\_app fallback in GroupResult.restore() (#4431)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Hill\*\*.



\- \*\*Consul Backend\*\*: Correct key string type for Python 2/3 compatibility (#4416)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Wido den Hollander\*\*.



\- \*\*Group Result\*\*: Correctly restore an empty GroupResult (#2202) (#4427)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alex Hill\*\* \& \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Result\*\*: Disable synchronous waiting for sub-tasks on eager mode(#4322)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Denis Podlesniy\*\*.



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Detect timezone or Daylight Saving Time changes (#1604) (#4403)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Vincent Barbaresi\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fix append to an empty chain. Fixes #4047. (#4402)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Allow shadow to override task name in trace and logging messages. (#4379)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`hclihn`.



\- \*\*Documentation/Sphinx\*\*: Fix getfullargspec Python 2.x compatibility in contrib/sphinx.py (#4399)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Javier Martin Montull\*\*.



\- \*\*Documentation\*\*: Updated installation instructions for SQS broker (#4382)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Sergio Fernandez\*\*.



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Better equality comparison for ScheduleEntry instances (#4312)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`mariia-zelenova`.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Adding 'shadow' property to as\_task\_v2 (#4350)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Marcelo Da Cruz Pinto\*\*.



\- Try to import directly, do not use deprecated imp method (#4216)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Tobias Kunze\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Enable `kwargsrepr` and `argsrepr` override for modifying task argument representation (#4260)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*James M. Allen\*\*.



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Add Redis Sentinel backend (#4144)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Geoffrey Bauduin\*\*.



\- Use unique time values for Collections/LimitedSet (#3879 and #3891) (#3892)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`lead2gold`.



\- \*\*CI\*\*: Report coverage for all result backends.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*.



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Use Django DB max age connection setting (fixes #4116) (#4292)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Marco Schweighauser\*\*.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Properly take into account chain tasks link\_error (#4240)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`agladkov`.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Allow to create group with single task (fixes issue #4255) (#4280)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`agladkov`.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Copy dictionary parameter in chord.from\_dict before modifying (fixes issue #4223) (#4278)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`agladkov`.



\- \*\*Results Backend\*\*: Add Cassandra options (#4224)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Scott Cooper\*\*.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Apply rate limiting for tasks with ETA (#4251)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`arpanshah29`.



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: support scheduler entries without a schedule (#4235)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Markus Kaiserswerth\*\*.



\- \*\*SQS Broker\*\*: Updated SQS requirements file with correct boto3 version (#4231)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alejandro Varas\*\*.



\- Remove unused code from \_create\_app contextmanager (#4204)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Ryan P Kilby\*\*.



\- \*\*Group Result\*\*: Modify GroupResult.as\_tuple() to include parent (fixes #4106) (#4205)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`pachewise`.



\- \*\*Beat\*\*: Set default scheduler class in beat command. (#4189)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`Kxrr`.



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Retry signal receiver after raised exception (#4192)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*David Davis\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Allow custom Request class for tasks (#3977)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Manuel Vázquez Acosta\*\*.



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Django fixup should close all cache backends (#4187)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Raphaël Riel\*\*.



\- \*\*Deployment\*\*: Adds stopasgroup to the supervisor scripts (#4200)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`martialp`.



\- Using Exception.args to serialize/deserialize exceptions (#4085)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Alexander Ovechkin\*\*.



\- \*\*Timezones\*\*: Correct calculation of application current time with timezone (#4173)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*.



\- \*\*Remote Debugger\*\*: Set the SO\_REUSEADDR option on the socket (#3969)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Theodore Dubois\*\*.



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Celery ignores exceptions raised during `django.setup()` (#4146)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Kevin Gu\*\*.



\- Use heartbeat setting from application configuration for Broker connection (#4148)



&#x20;   Contributed by :github\_user:`mperice`.



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Fixed exception caused by next\_transit receiving an unexpected argument. (#4103)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*DDevine\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\* Introduce exponential backoff with Task auto-retry (#4101)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*David Baumgold\*\*.



\- \*\*AsyncResult\*\*: Remove weak-references to bound methods in AsyncResult promises. (#4131)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Vinod Chandru\*\*.



\- \*\*Development/Testing\*\*: Allow eager application of canvas structures (#4576)



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Nicholas Pilon\*\*.



\- \*\*Command Line\*\*: Flush stderr before exiting with error code 1.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Antonin Delpeuch\*\*.



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Escapes single quotes in kwargsrepr strings.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Kareem Zidane\*\*



\- \*\*AsyncResult\*\*: Restore ability to join over ResultSet after fixing celery/#3818.



&#x20;   Contributed by \*\*Derek Harland\*\*



\- \*\*Redis Results Backend\*\*: Unsubscribe on message success.



&#x20; Previously Celery would leak channels, filling the memory of the Redis instance.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Only convert eta to isoformat when it is not already a string.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- \*\*Redis Results Backend\*\*: The result\_backend setting now supports rediss:// URIs



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*James Remeika\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\* Keyword arguments are passed to tasks in chain as expected.



&#x20; Contributed by :github\_user:`tothegump`



\- \*\*Django\*\* Fix a regression causing Celery to crash when using Django.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Jonas Haag\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\* Chain with one task now runs as expected.



&#x20; Contributed by :github\_user:`tothegump`



\- \*\*Kombu\*\* Celery 4.2 now requires Kombu 4.2 or better.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz \& Asif Saifuddin Auvi\*\*



\- `GreenletExit` is not in `\_\_all\_\_` in greenlet.py which can not be imported by Python 3.6.



&#x20; The import was adjusted to work on Python 3.6 as well.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Hsiaoming Yang\*\*



\- Fixed a regression that occurred during the development of Celery 4.2 which caused `celery report` to crash when Django is installed.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Josue Balandrano Coronel\*\*



\- Matched the behavior of `GroupResult.as\_tuple()` to that of `AsyncResult.as\_tuple()`.



&#x20; The group's parent is now serialized correctly.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Josue Balandrano Coronel\*\*



\- Use Redis coercion mechanism for converting URI query parameters.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Justin Patrin\*\*



\- Fixed the representation of `GroupResult`.



&#x20; The dependency graph is now presented correctly.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Josue Balandrano Coronel\*\*



Documentation, CI, Installation and Tests fixes:





&#x20;   - \*\*Sammie S. Taunton\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Dan Wilson\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`pachewise`

&#x20;   - \*\*Sergi Almacellas Abellana\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Omer Katz\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Alex Zaitsev\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Leo Singer\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Rachel Johnson\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jon Dufresne\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Samuel Dion-Girardeau\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Ryan Guest\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Huang Huang\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Geoffrey Bauduin\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Andrew Wong\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Mads Jensen\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Jackie Leng\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Harry Moreno\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`michael-k`

&#x20;   - \*\*Nicolas Mota\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Armenak Baburyan\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Patrick Zhang\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`anentropic`

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`jairojair`

&#x20;   - \*\*Ben Welsh\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Michael Peake\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Fengyuan Chen\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`arpanshah29`

&#x20;   - \*\*Xavier Hardy\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Shitikanth\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Igor Kasianov\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*John Arnold\*\*

&#x20;   - :github\_user:`dmollerm`

&#x20;   - \*\*Robert Knight\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Eduardo Ramírez\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Kamil Breguła\*\*

&#x20;   - \*\*Juan Gutierrez\*\*
```

\### 代码文件: docs\\history\\changelog-4.3.rst

```rst

.. \_changelog-4.3:



================

&#x20;Change history

================



This document contains change notes for bugfix releases in

the 4.3.x series, please see :ref:`whatsnew-4.3` for

an overview of what's new in Celery 4.3.



4.3.1

=====



:release-date: 2020-09-10 1:00 P.M UTC+3:00

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- Limit vine version to be below 5.0.0.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



4.3.0

=====

:release-date: 2019-03-31 7:00 P.M UTC+3:00

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- Added support for broadcasting using a regular expression pattern

&#x20; or a glob pattern to multiple Pidboxes.



&#x20; This allows you to inspect or ping multiple workers at once.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Dmitry Malinovsky\*\* \& \*\*Jason Held\*\*



\- Added support for PEP 420 namespace packages.



&#x20; This allows you to load tasks from namespace packages.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Colin Watson\*\*



\- Added :setting:`acks\_on\_failure\_or\_timeout` as a setting instead of

&#x20; a task only option.



&#x20; This was missing from the original PR but now added for completeness.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- Added the :signal:`task\_received` signal.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- Fixed a crash of our CLI that occurred for everyone using Python < 3.6.



&#x20; The crash was introduced in `acd6025 <https://github.com/celery/celery/commit/acd6025b7dc4db112a31020686fc8b15e1722c67>`\_

&#x20; by using the :class:`ModuleNotFoundError` exception which was introduced

&#x20; in Python 3.6.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- Fixed a crash that occurred when using the Redis result backend

&#x20; while the :setting:`result\_expires` is set to None.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Toni Ruža\*\* \& \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- Added support the `DNS seedlist connection format <https://docs.mongodb.com/manual/reference/connection-string/#dns-seedlist-connection-format>`\_

&#x20; for the MongoDB result backend.



&#x20; This requires the `dnspython` package which will be installed by default

&#x20; when installing the dependencies for the MongoDB result backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*



\- Bump the minimum eventlet version to 0.24.1.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*



\- Replace the `msgpack-python` package with `msgpack`.



&#x20; We're no longer using the deprecated package.

&#x20; See our :ref:`important notes <v430-important>` for this release

&#x20; for further details on how to upgrade.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Daniel Hahler\*\*



\- Allow scheduling error handlers which are not registered tasks in the current

&#x20; worker.



&#x20; These kind of error handlers are now possible:



&#x20; .. code-block:: python



&#x20;   from celery import Signature

&#x20;   Signature(

&#x20;     'bar', args=\['foo'],

&#x20;     link\_error=Signature('msg.err', queue='msg')

&#x20;   ).apply\_async()



\- Additional fixes and enhancements to the SSL support of

&#x20; the Redis broker and result backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Jeremy Cohen\*\*



Code Cleanups, Test Coverage \& CI Improvements by:



&#x20; - \*\*Omer Katz\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Florian Chardin\*\*



Documentation Fixes by:



&#x20; - \*\*Omer Katz\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Samuel Huang\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Amir Hossein Saeid Mehr\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Dmytro Litvinov\*\*



4.3.0 RC2

=========

:release-date: 2019-03-03 9:30 P.M UTC+2:00

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- \*\*Filesystem Backend\*\*: Added meaningful error messages for filesystem backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Lars Rinn\*\*



\- \*\*New Result Backend\*\*: Added the ArangoDB backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Dilip Vamsi Moturi\*\*



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Prepend current working directory instead of appending so that

&#x20; the project directory will have precedence over system modules as expected.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Antonin Delpeuch\*\*



\- Bump minimum py-redis version to 3.2.0.



&#x20; Due to multiple bugs in earlier versions of py-redis that were causing

&#x20; issues for Celery, we were forced to bump the minimum required version to 3.2.0.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- \*\*Dependencies\*\*: Bump minimum required version of Kombu to 4.4



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



4.3.0 RC1

=========

:release-date: 2019-02-20 5:00 PM IST

:release-by: Omer Katz



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: :meth:`celery.chain.apply` does not ignore keyword arguments anymore when

&#x20; applying the chain.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Korijn van Golen\*\*



\- \*\*Result Set\*\*: Don't attempt to cache results in a :class:`celery.result.ResultSet`.



&#x20; During a join, the results cache was populated using :meth:`celery.result.ResultSet.get`, if one of the results

&#x20; contains an exception, joining unexpectedly failed.



&#x20; The results cache is now removed.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Derek Harland\*\*



\- \*\*Application\*\*: :meth:`celery.Celery.autodiscover\_tasks` now attempts to import the package itself

&#x20; when the `related\_name` keyword argument is `None`.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Alex Ioannidis\*\*



\- \*\*Windows Support\*\*: On Windows 10, stale PID files prevented celery beat to run.

&#x20; We now remove them when a :class:`SystemExit` is raised.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`na387`\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Added the new :setting:`task\_acks\_on\_failure\_or\_timeout` setting.



&#x20; Acknowledging SQS messages on failure or timing out makes it impossible to use

&#x20; dead letter queues.



&#x20; We introduce the new option acks\_on\_failure\_or\_timeout,

&#x20; to ensure we can totally fallback on native SQS message lifecycle,

&#x20; using redeliveries for retries (in case of slow processing or failure)

&#x20; and transitions to dead letter queue after defined number of times.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Mario Kostelac\*\*



\- \*\*RabbitMQ Broker\*\*: Adjust HA headers to work on RabbitMQ 3.x.



&#x20; This change also means we're ending official support for RabbitMQ 2.x.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*



\- \*\*Command Line\*\*: Improve :program:`celery update` error handling.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Federico Bond\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Support chords with :setting:`task\_always\_eager` set to `True`.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Axel Haustant\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Optionally store task properties in result backend.



&#x20; Setting the :setting:`result\_extended` configuration option to `True` enables

&#x20; storing additional task properties in the result backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*John Arnold\*\*



\- \*\*Couchbase Result Backend\*\*: Allow the Couchbase result backend to

&#x20; automatically detect the serialization format.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Douglas Rohde\*\*



\- \*\*New Result Backend\*\*: Added the Azure Block Blob Storage result backend.



&#x20; The backend is implemented on top of the azure-storage library which

&#x20; uses Azure Blob Storage for a scalable low-cost PaaS backend.



&#x20; The backend was load tested via a simple nginx/gunicorn/sanic app hosted

&#x20; on a DS4 virtual machine (4 vCores, 16 GB RAM) and was able to handle

&#x20; 600+ concurrent users at \~170 RPS.



&#x20; The commit also contains a live end-to-end test to facilitate

&#x20; verification of the backend functionality. The test is activated by

&#x20; setting the `AZUREBLOCKBLOB\_URL` environment variable to

&#x20; `azureblockblob://{ConnectionString}` where the value for

&#x20; `ConnectionString` can be found in the `Access Keys` pane of a Storage

&#x20; Account resources in the Azure Portal.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Clemens Wolff\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: :meth:`celery.app.task.update\_state` now accepts keyword arguments.



&#x20; This allows passing extra fields to the result backend.

&#x20; These fields are unused by default but custom result backends can use them

&#x20; to determine how to store results.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Christopher Dignam\*\*



\- Gracefully handle consumer :class:`kombu.exceptions.DecodeError`.



&#x20; When using the v2 protocol the worker no longer crashes when the consumer

&#x20; encounters an error while decoding a message.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Steven Sklar\*\*



\- \*\*Deployment\*\*: Fix init.d service stop.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Marcus McHale\*\*



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Drop support for Django < 1.11.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*



\- \*\*Django\*\*: Remove old djcelery loader.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: :class:`celery.worker.request.Request` now passes

&#x20; :class:`celery.app.task.Context` to the backend's store\_result functions.



&#x20; Since the class currently passes `self` to these functions,

&#x20; revoking a task resulted in corrupted task result data when

&#x20; django-celery-results was used.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Kiyohiro Yamaguchi\*\*



\- \*\*Worker\*\*: Retry if the heartbeat connection dies.



&#x20; Previously, we keep trying to write to the broken connection.

&#x20; This results in a memory leak because the event dispatcher will keep appending

&#x20; the message to the outbound buffer.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Raf Geens\*\*



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Handle microseconds when scheduling.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*K Davis\*\*



\- \*\*Asynpool\*\*: Fixed deadlock when closing socket.



&#x20; Upon attempting to close a socket, :class:`celery.concurrency.asynpool.AsynPool`

&#x20; only removed the queue writer from the hub but did not remove the reader.

&#x20; This led to a deadlock on the file descriptor

&#x20; and eventually the worker stopped accepting new tasks.



&#x20; We now close both the reader and the writer file descriptors in a single loop

&#x20; iteration which prevents the deadlock.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Joshua Engelman\*\*



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: Correctly consider timezone when calculating timestamp.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`yywing`\*\*



\- \*\*Celery Beat\*\*: :meth:`celery.beat.Scheduler.schedules\_equal` can now handle

&#x20; either arguments being a `None` value.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:` ratson`\*\*



\- \*\*Documentation/Sphinx\*\*: Fixed Sphinx support for shared\_task decorated functions.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Jon Banafato\*\*



\- \*\*New Result Backend\*\*: Added the CosmosDB result backend.



&#x20; This change adds a new results backend.

&#x20; The backend is implemented on top of the pydocumentdb library which uses

&#x20; Azure CosmosDB for a scalable, globally replicated, high-performance,

&#x20; low-latency and high-throughput PaaS backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Clemens Wolff\*\*



\- \*\*Application\*\*: Added configuration options to allow separate multiple apps

&#x20; to run on a single RabbitMQ vhost.



&#x20; The newly added :setting:`event\_exchange` and :setting:`control\_exchange`

&#x20; configuration options allow users to use separate Pidbox exchange

&#x20; and a separate events exchange.



&#x20; This allow different Celery applications to run separately on the same vhost.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Artem Vasilyev\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Forget parent result metadata when forgetting

&#x20; a result.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`tothegump`\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\* Store task arguments inside :class:`celery.exceptions.MaxRetriesExceededError`.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Anthony Ruhier\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Added the :setting:`result\_accept\_content` setting.



&#x20; This feature allows to configure different accepted content for the result

&#x20; backend.



&#x20; A special serializer (`auth`) is used for signed messaging,

&#x20; however the result\_serializer remains in json, because we don't want encrypted

&#x20; content in our result backend.



&#x20; To accept unsigned content from the result backend,

&#x20; we introduced this new configuration option to specify the

&#x20; accepted content from the backend.



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fixed error callback processing for class based tasks.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Victor Mireyev\*\*



\- \*\*New Result Backend\*\*: Added the S3 result backend.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Florian Chardin\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Added support for Cythonized Celery tasks.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Andrey Skabelin\*\*



\- \*\*Riak Result Backend\*\*: Warn Riak backend users for possible Python 3.7 incompatibilities.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\*



\- \*\*Python Runtime\*\*: Added Python 3.7 support.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\* \& \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*



\- \*\*Auth Serializer\*\*: Revamped the auth serializer.



&#x20; The auth serializer received a complete overhaul.

&#x20; It was previously horribly broken.



&#x20; We now depend on cryptography instead of pyOpenSSL for this serializer.



\- \*\*Command Line\*\*: :program:`celery report` now reports kernel version along

&#x20; with other platform details.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Fixed chords with chains which include sub chords in a group.



&#x20; Celery now correctly executes the last task in these types of canvases:



&#x20; .. code-block:: python



&#x20;   c = chord(

&#x20;     group(\[

&#x20;         chain(

&#x20;             dummy.si(),

&#x20;             chord(

&#x20;                 group(\[dummy.si(), dummy.si()]),

&#x20;                 dummy.si(),

&#x20;             ),

&#x20;         ),

&#x20;         chain(

&#x20;             dummy.si(),

&#x20;             chord(

&#x20;                 group(\[dummy.si(), dummy.si()]),

&#x20;                 dummy.si(),

&#x20;             ),

&#x20;         ),

&#x20;     ]),

&#x20;     dummy.si()

&#x20;   )



&#x20;   c.delay().get()



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Maximilien Cuony\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Complex canvases with error callbacks no longer raises an :class:`AttributeError`.



&#x20; Very complex canvases such as `this <https://github.com/merchise/xopgi.base/blob/6634819ad5c701c04bc9baa5c527449070843b71/xopgi/xopgi\_cdr/cdr\_agent.py#L181>`\_

&#x20; no longer raise an :class:`AttributeError` which prevents constructing them.



&#x20; We do not know why this bug occurs yet.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Manuel Vázquez Acosta\*\*



\- \*\*Command Line\*\*: Added proper error messages in cases where app cannot be loaded.



&#x20; Previously, celery crashed with an exception.



&#x20; We now print a proper error message.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Omer Katz\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Added the :setting:`task\_default\_priority` setting.



&#x20; You can now set the default priority of a task using

&#x20; the :setting:`task\_default\_priority` setting.

&#x20; The setting's value will be used if no priority is provided for a specific

&#x20; task.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`madprogrammer`\*\*



\- \*\*Dependencies\*\*: Bump minimum required version of Kombu to 4.3

&#x20; and Billiard to 3.6.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*



\- \*\*Result Backend\*\*: Fix memory leak.



&#x20; We reintroduced weak references to bound methods for AsyncResult callback promises,

&#x20; after adding full weakref support for Python 2 in `vine <https://github.com/celery/vine/tree/v1.2.0>`\_.

&#x20; More details can be found in `celery/celery#4839 <https://github.com/celery/celery/pull/4839>`\_.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*George Psarakis\*\* and \*\*:github\_user:`monsterxx03`\*\*.



\- \*\*Task Execution\*\*: Fixed roundtrip serialization for eager tasks.



&#x20; When doing the roundtrip serialization for eager tasks,

&#x20; the task serializer will always be JSON unless the `serializer` argument

&#x20; is present in the call to :meth:`celery.app.task.Task.apply\_async`.

&#x20; If the serializer argument is present but is `'pickle'`,

&#x20; an exception will be raised as pickle-serialized objects

&#x20; cannot be deserialized without specifying to `serialization.loads`

&#x20; what content types should be accepted.

&#x20; The Producer's `serializer` seems to be set to `None`,

&#x20; causing the default to JSON serialization.



&#x20; We now continue to use (in order) the `serializer` argument to :meth:`celery.app.task.Task.apply\_async`,

&#x20; if present, or the `Producer`'s serializer if not `None`.

&#x20; If the `Producer`'s serializer is `None`,

&#x20; it will use the Celery app's `task\_serializer` configuration entry as the serializer.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Brett Jackson\*\*



\- \*\*Redis Result Backend\*\*: The :class:`celery.backends.redis.ResultConsumer` class no longer assumes

&#x20; :meth:`celery.backends.redis.ResultConsumer.start` to be called before

&#x20; :meth:`celery.backends.redis.ResultConsumer.drain\_events`.



&#x20; This fixes a race condition when using the Gevent workers pool.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*Noam Kush\*\*



\- \*\*Task\*\*: Added the :setting:`task\_inherit\_parent\_priority` setting.



&#x20; Setting the :setting:`task\_inherit\_parent\_priority` configuration option to

&#x20; `True` will make Celery tasks inherit the priority of the previous task

&#x20; linked to it.



&#x20; Examples:



&#x20; .. code-block:: python



&#x20;   c = celery.chain(

&#x20;     add.s(2), # priority=None

&#x20;     add.s(3).set(priority=5), # priority=5

&#x20;     add.s(4), # priority=5

&#x20;     add.s(5).set(priority=3), # priority=3

&#x20;     add.s(6), # priority=3

&#x20;   )



&#x20; .. code-block:: python



&#x20;   @app.task(bind=True)

&#x20;   def child\_task(self):

&#x20;     pass



&#x20;   @app.task(bind=True)

&#x20;   def parent\_task(self):

&#x20;     child\_task.delay()



&#x20;   # child\_task will also have priority=5

&#x20;   parent\_task.apply\_async(args=\[], priority=5)



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`madprogrammer`\*\*



\- \*\*Canvas\*\*: Added the :setting:`result\_chord\_join\_timeout` setting.



&#x20; Previously, :meth:`celery.result.GroupResult.join` had a fixed timeout of 3

&#x20; seconds.



&#x20; The :setting:`result\_chord\_join\_timeout` setting now allows you to change it.



&#x20; Contributed by \*\*:github\_user:`srafehi`\*\*



Code Cleanups, Test Coverage \& CI Improvements by:



&#x20; - \*\*Jon Dufresne\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Omer Katz\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Brett Jackson\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Bruno Alla\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*:github\_user:`tothegump`\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Bojan Jovanovic\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Florian Chardin\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*:github\_user:`walterqian`\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Fabian Becker\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Lars Rinn\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*:github\_user:`madprogrammer`\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Ciaran Courtney\*\*



Documentation Fixes by:



&#x20; - \*\*Lewis M. Kabui\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Dash Winterson\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Shanavas M\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Brett Randall\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Przemysław Suliga\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Joshua Schmid\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Asif Saif Uddin\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Xiaodong\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Vikas Prasad\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Jamie Alessio\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Lars Kruse\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Guilherme Caminha\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Andrea Rabbaglietti\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Itay Bittan\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Noah Hall\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Peng Weikang\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Mariatta Wijaya\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Ed Morley\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Paweł Adamczak\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*:github\_user:`CoffeeExpress`\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*:github\_user:`aviadatsnyk`\*\*

&#x20; - \*\*Brian Schrader\*\*
```
